summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 51 • Sleep 62 • Strain 1%

Read
Rest landed near normal, while deeper recovery is still only mid-range. Today favors consistency over intensity, with enough reserve for rhythm but not a strong signal for hard charging; for muscle change, protein carries more weight than extra burn.

Steady, not forceful.

Performance: Steady, not forceful.

Transit: none
